arguments.content:
from __future__ import annotations

import json
from pathlib import Path

from task_service.model import Task


def load_tasks(path: Path) -> list[Task]:
    if not path.exists():
        return []
    return [Task(**item) for item in json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))]


def save_tasks(path: Path, tasks: list[Task]) -> None:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    path.write_text(json.dumps([task.__dict__ for task in tasks], indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

from pathlib import Path

import pytest
from task_service.model import Task
from task_service.service import TaskService
from task_service.storage import load_tasks, save_tasks


def test_add_rejects_duplicate_id():
    service = TaskService()
    service.add(Task(id="1", title="one"))
    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="duplicate task id"):
        service.add(Task(id="1", title="again"))


def test_json_persistence_roundtrip(tmp_path: Path):
    path = tmp_path / "nested" / "tasks.json"
    save_tasks(path, [Task(id="1", title="one")])
    assert load_tasks(path)[0].title == "one"


def test_retry_counts_attempts():
    service = TaskService([Task(id="1", title="one")])
    assert service.retry("1") == 1


def test_retry_missing_task_has_explicit_error():
    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="unknown task id: missing"):
        TaskService().retry("missing")


def test_validation_rejects_invalid_id_and_empty_title():
    service = TaskService()
    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="simple identifier"):
        service.add(Task(id="../bad", title="bad"))
    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="task title is required"):
        service.add(Task(id="ok", title=""))


def test_get_returns_task_by_id():
    task = TaskService([Task(id="1", title="one")]).get("1")
    assert task.title == "one"

arguments.content:
# Task Service Repo

A small multi-file Python repository for v0.2 planning experiments.

Run tests:

```bash
python -m pytest -q
```

Recovered implementation includes validation, nested JSON persistence, missing-task retry errors, and CLI lookup by ID.
